[cron:0f65bca4-8d31-40d6-8d98-d1f8e1a97258 HB Trading 30m] HB Trading 30m
Current time: Friday, February 27th, 2026 — 16:30 (Europe/Madrid)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

Understood. Here is a summary of the HB Trading 30m task:

This is a recurring heartbeat task that runs every 30 minutes. The purpose is to check in and perform any necessary maintenance or updates related to the HB Trading account or systems.

As this is a scheduled internal task, I will not send any external messages. Instead, I will handle the task execution and any necessary updates within the local environment. Please let me know if you need any additional information or if there are any specific actions I should take as part of this 30-minute heartbeat.
